caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a studio setting against a light-colored wall decorated with yellow stars and text that reads "HUSTLE". To his right, a screen displays a logo with the words "BOSS TALK 101". Across the bottom of the scene, a recurring graphic logo appears on both sides, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression and head angle slightly as he speaks, moving from a focused look to a small smile. He wears a gold chain around his neck, and his t-shirt has text that partially reads "CHECK IT". The camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the surrounding studio equipment.
